news.title: Is the India-EU FTA equitable? Europe’s Digital Product Passport raises questions on that score

rankings.why_it_matters: Signals ongoing liquidity tightness, which could constrain future lending and affect borrowing costs across the economy.

rankings.title: Bihar MFI bill may disrupt operations, delay recoveries, say analysts
rankings.india_relevance: State-level policy with potential to disrupt microfinance operations in a major Indian state.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights regulatory risk in the financial inclusion sector, impacting credit flow and institutional stability.

rankings.title: FMCG sales growth moderates to 7.8% in December quarter amid GST revamp
rankings.india_relevance: Shows impact of a major Indian tax policy change on consumption trends.
rankings.why_it_matters: Indicates how policy transition (GST) is affecting pricing, volumes, and growth in a core consumer sector.

rankings.title: Share of credit card outstanding balance in total retail loans declines 60 bps y-o-y to 4.4%
rankings.india_relevance: Reveals a shift in Indian household borrowing patterns.
rankings.why_it_matters: Suggests changing consumer credit preferences or potential risk aversion, relevant for banks and policymakers.

rankings.title: India’s sugar output estimate cut to 28.3 million tonnes on lower cane yields
rankings.india_relevance: Revision of production forecast for a major Indian agricultural commodity.
rankings.why_it_matters: Affects domestic prices, export policy, and farmer incomes, with linkages to the ethanol blending program.

rankings.title: States spend just 52% of FY26 capex budget in April-January period
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights a critical bottleneck in India's public investment drive.
rankings.why_it_matters: Slow capital expenditure by states undermines a key growth lever, affecting infrastructure and economic multipliers.

rankings.title: NABARD unveils climate innovation challenge with ₹15 lakh top prize
rankings.india_relevance: Indian development bank launches initiative to fund climate solutions.
rankings.why_it_matters: Signals the financial system's growing focus on incentivizing climate adaptation and mitigation technologies relevant to India.
